message:
test(core): property-based tests for pane_lifecycle module (40 tests)

Covers PaneHealth enum invariants, health classification boundaries,
LifecycleConfig serde, LifecycleAction destructiveness, engine state
tracking, and pressure_renice_candidates properties.

Also fixes missing CheckpointCommitOutcome import in storage_telemetry.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
